item.description: Setup a webapp to generate QR code. Demo available at https://ez-qrcode-generator.herokuapp.com/

item.description: Two simple examples from LeetCode to illustrate the idea of Dynamic Programming.

item.description: How to use one of simplest supervised learning model (Naive Bayes) to perform language detection.
